home.title: Tokensense-Ai | Kostenloser LLM-Token-Zähler & Prompt-Kostenrechner
home.description: Berechnen Sie KI-Prompt-Kosten sofort. Schätzen Sie die Token-Nutzung und API-Preise für GPT-5, Claude 3.5 und Gemini. 100% clientseitig, privat und keine Anmeldung erforderlich.
home.keywords: LLM-Token-Zähler, Prompt-Kostenrechner, GPT-5 Preise, KI-Entwickler-Tools, Claude Token-Zählung, Gemini API-Kosten
home.og_description: Kennen Sie Ihre API-Kosten, bevor Sie auf Senden klicken. 100% private, clientseitige Token-Zählung.
home.twitter_description: Sofortige Kostenschätzungen für GPT-, Claude- und Gemini-Prompts.

hero.badge: Der einzige Rechner, der Agent-Schleifenkosten simuliert
hero.subheadline: Kenne deine Token-Anzahl und Preise für GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5 und 50+ Modelle, bevor du sendest.

calculator.compress_basic_desc: Entfernt Leerzeichen und Zeilenumbrüche. Minifiziert JSON. Sehr sicher.
calculator.compress_advanced_desc: Entfernt Markdown-Struktur und Code-Kommentare. Ausgabe prüfen.

model_picker.placeholder: Modell auswählen, um Kosten zu sehen →

compare.title: Vergleichsmodus
compare.step_desc: Füge mehrere Modelle hinzu, um Kosten für denselben Prompt nebeneinander zu sehen.
compare.enter_prompt: Prompt eingeben, um Kostenvergleich zu sehen.

smart_routing.title: Intelligentes Routing
smart_routing.desc: Möchtest du das {multiplier}x günstiger ausführen? Dieser Prompt passt zu {model}.

shell.title: Video Token Budget Planner
shell.description: Estimate and compare AI video processing costs across providers.
shell.no_video_description: Upload a file or paste a URL on the left to start planning your token budget and comparing provider costs.
shell.privacy_description: Tokensense is a client-side tool. Your video data is processed locally in your browser for file uploads. API keys are stored in your browser's localStorage and are never sent to our servers. External URL analysis is performed via a secure proxy that does not store your content.
shell.methodology_description: Estimates are based on published tokenization rates for Gemini, Claude, and GPT-4o models. Actual costs may vary slightly based on specific prompt overhead and provider-side adjustments.

input.upload_description: Drag and drop or click to browse
input.url_placeholder: Paste YouTube, Vimeo, or direct video link...

config.title: Parameters
config.sampling_hint: Higher FPS increases visual detail but significantly increases token cost.
config.sampling_recommendation: 1 FPS is recommended for most tasks.

results.title: Analysis Results
results.pricing_disclaimer: Pricing last updated: March 2026. Includes input tokens only. Output costs vary by response length.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.privacy_description: Keys are saved in your browser's localStorage only. They are never sent to our servers. All provider calls happen directly from your browser.
keys.clear_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all saved API keys?
keys.exact_measure_hint: Connect a key to enable Exact Measurement mode.
